api/src/server.js.intent: Express entry point that mounts all routes, applies helmet/CORS/cookie-parser, enforces global JWT auth with PUBLIC_PATHS bypass, and rate-limits login endpoints
api/src/server.js.notes: JWT_SECRET required at startup; loginLimiter on /api/Auth/login and /api/Account/Login; global 404 and error-handling middleware included

api/src/db.js.intent: PostgreSQL connection pool with dbo search_path and a thin query() helper
api/src/db.js.notes: All routes use query(); search_path=dbo ensures dbo schema tables are resolved without prefix

api/src/session-defaults.js.intent: Static feature-flag list and permission group defaults returned by the session endpoint to mimic the live TDental session payload
api/src/session-defaults.js.notes: Used by session.js to hydrate GetSessionInfo response; not DB-driven

api/src/middleware/auth.js.intent: Verifies Bearer JWT and resolves effective permissions (group base + per-employee overrides) for requirePermission gates
api/src/middleware/auth.js.notes: requireAuth returns 401 without token; requirePermission loads group_permissions + permission_overrides and returns 403 if missing

api/src/routes/auth.js.intent: Login endpoint that validates credentials against aspnetusers, issues JWT with employeeId/permissions payload, and resolves location scope
api/src/routes/auth.js.notes: Uses bcryptjs for password check; resolvePermissions() helper shared internally; also handles logout

api/src/routes/account.js.intent: Legacy /api/Account/Login login handler issuing JWT for the old Account-style login path
api/src/routes/account.js.notes: Parallel login path alongside /api/Auth/login for client compatibility; both share the same rate limiter

api/src/routes/session.js.intent: Returns session info (features, groups, configs) from truth-session.json merged with JWT user context
api/src/routes/session.js.notes: Reads truth-session.json at startup for static payload; falls back to null if file missing

api/src/routes/config.js.intent: Stub endpoint for /api/IrConfigParameters/GetParam that always returns null value
api/src/routes/config.js.notes: Placeholder to prevent 404s from frontend config polling; no DB interaction

api/src/routes/companies.js.intent: Lists all clinic branches from dbo.companies with paginated envelope
api/src/routes/companies.js.notes: Read-only; used by location filter dropdowns across all pages

api/src/routes/partners.js.intent: Customer CRUD with search, companyId filter, soft-delete, and cskhid/salestaffid staff assignment
api/src/routes/partners.js.notes: Hard-delete blocked by FK safety check; requirePermission gates on write operations; supports 87-field partner profile

api/src/routes/appointments.js.intent: Appointment CRUD with state machine transitions, date-range filtering, and companyId/doctor scoping
api/src/routes/appointments.js.notes: VALID_STATES enum enforced on create/update; UUID validation helper; requirePermission on write paths

api/src/routes/employees.js.intent: Employee/doctor list and CRUD with isDoctor/isAssistant filters, location scope, and tier management
api/src/routes/employees.js.notes: Queries dbo.partners where employee=true; supports multi-branch location scope via employee_location_scope junction table

api/src/routes/payments.js.intent: Per-record payment CRUD linked to a single saleorder or dotkham, with deposit tracking and payment method split
api/src/routes/payments.js.notes: Falls back to accountpayments for historical records not yet migrated; tracks deposit_used, cash_amount, bank_amount

api/src/routes/accountPayments.js.intent: Read-only listing of legacy account payment records filtered by partner_id
api/src/routes/accountPayments.js.notes: Legacy payment data source; superseded by payments.js for new records

api/src/routes/cashbooks.js.intent: Cash book (so quy) listing with journal, date-range, and search filters for fund-level transaction view
api/src/routes/cashbooks.js.notes: CB-01 So quy tien; exposes GetDetails endpoint matching live API shape

api/src/routes/receipts.js.intent: Customer payment receipt (phieu thu) listing filtered by partner and date range
api/src/routes/receipts.js.notes: CB-02 Phieu thu; returns paginated receipts with state filter

api/src/routes/customerReceipts.js.intent: Customer-scoped receipt history listing keyed by partner_id for the customer profile panel
api/src/routes/customerReceipts.js.notes: Distinct from receipts.js - scoped to individual customer profile view

api/src/routes/customerBalance.js.intent: Returns deposit balance and outstanding debt for a single customer calculated from the payments table
api/src/routes/customerBalance.js.notes: GET /:id only; falls back to 0 balance if no payment records exist

api/src/routes/monthlyPlans.js.intent: Monthly installment plan CRUD tied to a single saleorder or dotkham record with scheduled payment items
api/src/routes/monthlyPlans.js.notes: Per-record model; joins saleorders and dotkhams for record name; requirePermission gates on write

api/src/routes/dotKhams.js.intent: Examination round (dot kham) listing and CRUD filtered by partner_id for treatment visit tracking
api/src/routes/dotKhams.js.notes: dotkhams is a VIEW in demo schema; write operations target underlying table

api/src/routes/externalCheckups.js.intent: External health checkup image management with hosoonline.com integration for uploading and retrieving checkup proofs
api/src/routes/externalCheckups.js.notes: Uses multer for multipart upload; proxies to HOSOONLINE_BASE_URL; requirePermission('external_checkups.view')

api/src/routes/saleOrders.js.intent: Treatment/sale order listing and CRUD for customer service history, filtered by partner_id
api/src/routes/saleOrders.js.notes: requirePermission on write; saleorders view in demo schema; supports state filter

api/src/routes/saleOrderLines.js.intent: Sale order line items listing used by dashboard service statistics widget with date/company filters
api/src/routes/saleOrderLines.js.notes: Read-only; camelCase field mapping for live API parity; null stubs for unavailable DB fields

api/src/routes/products.js.intent: Service/product catalog CRUD with category, type, and company filters for dental treatment items
api/src/routes/products.js.notes: Uses uuid for new record IDs; requirePermission on write; supports active filter

api/src/routes/productCategories.js.intent: Product category CRUD for grouping dental services and materials
api/src/routes/productCategories.js.notes: requirePermission on write; search and active filters on GET

api/src/routes/services.js.intent: Clinical service record CRUD (per-appointment service delivery) with doctor/assistant/location tracking
api/src/routes/services.js.notes: requirePermission('services.view') on GET; stores unit_price, quantity, discount, prescription

api/src/routes/permissions.js.intent: Permission group and employee permission assignment CRUD for role-based access control management

api/src/routes/dashboardReports.js.intent: Dashboard aggregation endpoint returning appointment counts, revenue, patient stats grouped by period and location
api/src/routes/dashboardReports.js.notes: requirePermission gate; computes stats from appointments and payments tables; supports companyId filter

api/src/routes/commissions.js.intent: Commission report listing for referral agents and employee sales commissions with date-range and company filters
api/src/routes/commissions.js.notes: COM-01 agent commissions, COM-02 employee commissions; read-only aggregation

api/src/routes/hrPayslips.js.intent: HR payslip listing for employee payroll records with state and date-range filters
api/src/routes/hrPayslips.js.notes: HR-01 bang luong; read-only in demo; no write endpoints

api/src/routes/journals.js.intent: Account journal listing used to populate fund selection dropdowns in cashbook views
api/src/routes/journals.js.notes: Read-only; type filter for cash/bank journal distinction

api/src/routes/stockPickings.js.intent: Inventory stock picking listing for incoming/outgoing/internal warehouse transfers
api/src/routes/stockPickings.js.notes: requirePermission on write; picking_type filter: incoming/outgoing/internal

api/src/routes/crmTasks.js.intent: CRM task listing with assignee, stage, and date-range filters for care workflow management
api/src/routes/crmTasks.js.notes: WORK-01; exposes GetPagedV2 endpoint matching live API; no write endpoints in demo

api/src/routes/customerSources.js.intent: Customer acquisition source CRUD with type filter and customer count aggregation
api/src/routes/customerSources.js.notes: requirePermission on write; used in customer create/edit form dropdowns

api/src/routes/systemPreferences.js.intent: Key-value system preferences store for app-wide configuration with category grouping
api/src/routes/systemPreferences.js.notes: requirePermission('settings.view/edit'); supports is_public filter for frontend-accessible prefs

api/src/routes/bankSettings.js.intent: Company bank account settings CRUD for QR payment and bank transfer configuration
api/src/routes/bankSettings.js.notes: requirePermission('settings.view'); GET /bank returns single row from company_bank_settings

api/src/routes/websitePages.js.intent: CMS website page CRUD with SEO metadata, status, and company scoping for multi-branch content management
api/src/routes/websitePages.js.notes: requirePermission('website.view/edit'); supports slug, status, search filters

api/src/routes/places.js.intent: Server-side proxy for Google Places autocomplete and details API to avoid CORS and hide the API key
api/src/routes/places.js.notes: requireAuth on all endpoints; proxies to maps.googleapis.com with GOOGLE_API_KEY from env

api/migrations/001_company_bank_settings.intent: Creates company_bank_settings table for storing bank BIN, account number, and account name
api/migrations/001_company_bank_settings.notes: Single-row table; used by bankSettings route

api/migrations/002_payment_proofs.sql.intent: Creates payment_proofs table linking proof images and QR codes to payment records
api/migrations/002_payment_proofs.sql.notes: id and payment_id later altered to uuid in migration 011

api/migrations/003_payment_allocations.s.intent: Creates payment_allocations ledger table for splitting one payment across multiple saleorder invoices
api/migrations/003_payment_allocations.s.notes: FK to payments(id) and saleorders(id); expanded by migration 006 to support dotkhams

api/migrations/004_payment_plan_items.sq.intent: Creates monthlyplan_items junction table linking monthly installment plans to specific invoices
api/migrations/004_payment_plan_items.sq.notes: FK to monthlyplans(id) and saleorders(id); unique constraint on plan+invoice pair

api/migrations/005_employee_location_sco.intent: Creates employee_location_scope junction table for multi-branch employee assignment
api/migrations/005_employee_location_sco.notes: Unique constraint on (employee_id, company_id); references dbo.partners and dbo.companies

api/migrations/006_dotkham_payment_alloc.intent: Extends payment_allocations to support dotkham record type alongside saleorder allocations
api/migrations/006_dotkham_payment_alloc.notes: Cannot add FK to dotkhams because it is a VIEW in demo schema; handled with nullable column

api/migrations/006_fix_location_scope_co.intent: Fixes employee_location_scope column naming inconsistency between old and new schema environments
api/migrations/006_fix_location_scope_co.notes: Idempotent DO block; renames legacy column to company_id if old name exists

api/migrations/007_add_external_checkups.intent: Backfills external_checkups.view permission into all existing permission groups for backward compatibility
api/migrations/007_add_external_checkups.notes: INSERT ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING; safe to re-run

api/migrations/008_data_migration_from_t.intent: Full data migration from old tdental DB to tdental_demo using dblink cross-database queries (v1)
api/migrations/008_data_migration_from_t.notes: Connects to old DB at 172.17.0.1:54323 via dblink extension; superseded by v2/v3

api/migrations/008_data_migration_from_t.intent: Revised full data migration from old tdental DB with improved table ordering and conflict handling (v2)
api/migrations/008_data_migration_from_t.notes: Same dblink approach as v1; iterative improvement; superseded by v3

api/migrations/008_data_migration_from_t.intent: Final data migration script from old tdental DB including new-system table recreation after DB reset (v3)
api/migrations/008_data_migration_from_t.notes: Also recreates lost new-system tables; most complete version of the migration

api/migrations/011_fix_payment_proofs_ty.intent: Alters payment_proofs id and payment_id columns from integer to uuid to match payments.id type
api/migrations/011_fix_payment_proofs_ty.notes: Destructive column type change; payment_id set to NULL on cast since old integers cannot map to uuid

api/migrations/012_add_cskhid_salestaffi.intent: Adds cskhid (customer service staff) and salestaffid (sales staff) UUID columns to dbo.partners
api/migrations/012_add_cskhid_salestaffi.notes: Both columns reference partners.id where employee=true; indexed with partial index

api/migrations/013_add_employee_role_fie.intent: Adds isdoctor, isassistant, isreceptionist, and HR data columns to dbo.partners for employee role persistence
api/migrations/013_add_employee_role_fie.notes: Allows employees VIEW to use real columns instead of deriving role from jobtitle string

api/migrations/014_payment_per_record.sq.intent: Adds record_id and record_type columns to payments table to enforce strict per-record payment linking
api/migrations/014_payment_per_record.sq.notes: Backfills from payment_allocations; first allocation wins for historical rows
